time_series_contracts.purpose: Common append-only normalized time-series event pipe.
OHLCV-like candle summaries derived from market/liquidity snapshots.
Liquidity, reserve, exit depth and depth-quality series.
Holder count, top-holder concentration and distribution change series.
Narrative impact score over time without forcing NONE matches onto tokens.
Risk status timeline from hard block, caution, wait-more-data and clearance events.
Price impact, slippage, tax, MEV, protected route and max-size evolution.
Paper decision observation windows before outcome-memory runtime.
Source quality, stale data, missing data and parse quality time-series.
Command center decision state timeline separate from raw signals.
